meals.name: Breakfast - Protein Packed Pancakes
ingredients: oats, banana, eggs, protein powder, almond milk
meals.reason: High in protein for muscle growth and complex carbs for sustained energy
swaps: use whole grain oats for added fiber

meals.name: Mid-Morning Snack - Greek Yogurt with Berries
meals.reason: Protein and antioxidants to support recovery and overall health
swaps: swap honey with a sugar-free alternative for lower calories

meals.name: Lunch - Grilled Chicken and Quinoa Salad
ingredients: grilled chicken, quinoa, mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, olive oil, lemon juice
meals.reason: Lean protein and complex carbs for muscle recovery and energy
swaps: use avocado instead of olive oil for healthy fats

meals.name: Afternoon Snack - Cottage Cheese and Pineapple
meals.reason: High in protein and low in calories, good for muscle growth and energy
swaps: swap fresh pineapple with canned pineapple for lower calories

meals.name: Dinner - Baked Salmon with Sweet Potato and Steamed Broccoli
ingredients: salmon fillet, sweet potato, broccoli, olive oil, lemon
meals.reason: Lean protein, complex carbs, and healthy fats for muscle recovery and energy
swaps: use avocado oil instead of olive oil for cooking

meals.name: Evening Snack - Protein Shake
meals.reason: High in protein for muscle growth and recovery
swaps: swap banana with a lower-calorie fruit like berries
